expected_state.ngap: NG Setup is established with the real Open5GS core and registration can progress to UE context setup.
expected_state.subscriber: sanitized-imsi-001 is accepted by the declared Open5GS profile.

observed_state.ngap: NG Setup completed, but registration was rejected by the real Open5GS core.
observed_state.subscriber: The observed subscriber or profile was not accepted as declared.

diff_summary: Registration does not progress past the core acceptance step.
The failure is procedural or profile-related rather than a total transport outage.
operator_next_step: Inspect the subscriber profile, PLMN/TAC/DNN assumptions, then decide whether to correct the request or roll back the lane.
